name: Beef Jerky
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the flank steak in the freezer for about half an hour, just until firm.
2. Slice the steak across the grain into 1/4-inch thick strips.
3. In a bowl, combine the remaining ingredients (lemon juice, garlic, honey, soy sauce, salt, and pepper) to make a marinade.
4. Marinate the steak strips in the mixture for at least 2 hours.
5. Place the marinated slices on a rack in a pan.
6. Dry the slices in an oven set to 150 degrees Fahrenheit for 12 hours.
